---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement in a few lines
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary
What should we improve?

## Why
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed change
What do you want to happen?

## Scope (optional)
Where does this apply? (page/doctype/feature)

## Notes (optional)
Examples, screenshots, or constraints.
